# MedLat

> Name: **medical** (imaging + rigour) + **mad lad** (slang for bold, memorable energy). Unified PyTorch library for first-stage models (tokenizers, continuous/discrete autoencoders, quantizers) and second-stage generators (autoregressive MaskGIT/MAR, diffusion DiT/LDM/ADM). Single string-key model registry: `get_model`, `available_models`, `get_model_info`. **2D CV and 3D medical volumes:** same registry; use `dims=2` vs `dims=3` (and consistent spatial config) on model builders.

## Spatial dimensionality (2D vs 3D)
- Registered models support **2D computer vision** and **3D volumetric medical imaging** (e.g. CT/MRI-style volumes) through the same IDs; set `dims=2` or `dims=3` and consistent `img_size` / spatial layout when calling `get_model`.

## Primary sources
- Repository: https://github.com/niklasbubeck/MedLat
- Human README: https://github.com/niklasbubeck/MedLat/blob/main/README.md
- Package name (pip): `medlat` (see pyproject.toml)

## Registry prefixes (families)
- `token.*` ‚Äî TiTok, MAETok, VMAE, DeTok, SoftVQ, ViTA
- `continuous.*` ‚Äî AEKL, MAISI, MedVAE, VAVAE, DCAE, soft VQ / WQ-VAE
- `discrete.*` ‚Äî VQ, RQ/QINCo family, FSQ, LFQ, BSQ, SimVQ, HCVQ, MaskGIT VQ presets
- `discrete.quantizer.*` ‚Äî standalone quantizer modules
- `maskgit.*`, `mar.*` ‚Äî autoregressive generators
- `dit.*`, `ldm.*`, `adm.*` ‚Äî latent diffusion / UNet generators

## Integration
- Glue module: `medlat.modules.wrapper.GenWrapper` pairs generator + first stage; respects discrete/continuous and autoregressive/non-autoregressive routes.

## Attention backends (PyTorch SDPA)
- All models use `torch.nn.functional.scaled_dot_product_attention` (SDPA). PyTorch auto-selects the best kernel: FlashAttention (fastest, CUDA + fp16/bf16), memory-efficient attention, or math (universal fallback).
- Override with `torch.nn.attention.sdpa_kernel(SDPBackend.FLASH_ATTENTION)` context manager (PyTorch ‚â• 2.3) or `torch.backends.cuda.sdp_kernel(enable_flash=True, ...)` (PyTorch 2.0/2.1).
- MDT: float additive relative-position bias as attn_mask ‚Äî FlashAttention not supported; PyTorch falls back automatically.
- Taming GPT: `is_causal=True` for training, `is_causal=False` for KV-cache inference.
- VMAE: falls back to manual attention only when `return_attn_map=True`.
- UViT / TiTok: use `ATTENTION_MODE` flag; SDPA is the default.

## Citation
BibTeX key `bubeck_medlat_2025` ‚Äî see README.md **Citation** section or project page `#citation`. Default: Bubeck, N. (2025). *MedLat* v0.1.0. https://github.com/niklasbubeck/MedLat
